creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
main difference between my system & Alex's is that I was still using an older loader.efi.

Now that I update I see this on each boot.

andy_t gave some info on IRC:

- rebuild with custom kernel

+include GENERIC
+ident ARMY
+
+options EARLY_PRINTF=pl011
+options SOCDEV_PA=0x9000000

- now we get a backtrace

WARNING! Trying to fire up the kernel, but no device tree blob found!

11:40 <@_andy_t_> It's a problem where the shift value is wrong
